query:
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[118].playoffTierType') as last_playoff_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[118].winner') as last_winner,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[118].matchupPeriodId') as last_period,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[117].playoffTierType') as prev_playoff_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[117].winner') as prev_winner
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2024 AND viewName = 'combined';

  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[118].matchupPeriodId') as last_period,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[117].playoffTierType') as prev_playoff_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[117].winner') as prev_winner
FROM espn_season_cache
